title: malleola macranthera
intro: Malleola macranthera, also known as the large-flowered malleola or Malleola macranthera, is an orchid species native to the tropical forests of the Philippines. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Malleola macranthera include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin, while also reducing pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, Malleola macranthera is often used in tea, tincture, or poultice form, allowing for its medicinal properties to be effectively harnessed for therapeutic use.
